english translation text: In the name of Allah, the Beneficent, the Merciful.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ أَدْخِلْ عَلَى أَهْلِ الْقُبُورِ السُّرُورَ،
english translation text: O Allah, delight the people of the graves.
O Allah, enrich every poor person.
O Allah, satiate every hungry person.

O Allah, clothe
every unclothed one.
O Allah, help every debtor pay his debts.
O Allah, relieve every distressed one.
O Allah, return every traveller (to his home).

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ أَصْلِحْ كُلَّ فَاسِدٍ مِنْ أُمُورِ الْمُسْلِمِينَ،
english translation text: O Allah, correct every wrong in the affairs of the Muslims.
O Allah, cure every sick one.

O Allah, ease our
poverty by Your wealth.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ غَيِّرْ سُوءَ حَالِنَا بِحُسْنِ حَالِكَ،
english translation text: O Allah, change our evil state to one of excellence.

arabic text: اللّهُمَّ اقْضِ عَنَّا الدَّيْنَ وَأَغْنِنَا مِنَ الْفَقْرِ،
english translation text: O Allah, relieve us of our debts, and enrich us from poverty.
Surely You have power over all things.

arabic text: اَللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّد
english translation text: O Allah, bless Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
